utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan contains all five of these items. Now, check each for completeness: (1) health_coverage — includes both physical and mental health coverage details and costs (monthly_cost and additional_fees) → fully specified. (2) property_coverage — includes coverage details but lacks explicit cost information → partially specified, not fully complete. (3) travel_coverage — includes coverage details but no costs → partially specified. (4) additional_services — includes enhancement service details and costs (setup_fee, administrative_fee) → fully specified. (5) total_budget — includes monthly and annual cost breakdown → fully specified. Thus, health_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget are fully specified (3 items).

For travel coverage, the plan covers all major travel protections and corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under 'travel_insurance', which also has a rating of 7. No explicit separate add-ons are listed beyond these, so only these three will be mapped to ratings.
